title: NijahPlay's Personal Pack
description: A completely vanilla modpack to make the game feel full of life, with far better performance! With Sodium as a base, and Iris for shaders, I combine cutting edge and well tested mods to get the best possible performance without looking dull!
body:
Based on ["NijahPlay's Performance Base"](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nijahplays-performance-base) 

Included shaders:

[Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) by [EminGT](https://modrinth.com/user/EminGT)

[Euphoria Patcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) by [SpacEagle17](https://modrinth.com/user/SpacEagle17)

Shader preset by me!

-------------------------------------------

*   **Performance**
    *   Significantly better FPS with new and tested optimization mods.
    *   Lower memory usage
    *   Improves world loading and chunk generation speed.
    *   Chunk update threads set to 1 to not overwhelm devices like laptops.

*   **Visuals**
    *   Includes Iris Shaders with the **Complementary Unbound** pack pre-installed as well as **Euphoria Patcher**.
    *   Dynamic lighting.
    *   Adds connected textures, MANY new particles and effects, and other visual details in every corner of the game.

*   **Audio**
    *   More immersion with many more sounds, as well as changing when and where music is played.

*   **Quality of Life**
    *   Mod menu for personal customisation.
    *   Adds helpful HUD elements like hunger/saturation info and better mount displays.
    *   Includes convenience features like zoom.
    *   Saves power by reducing FPS when the game is tabbed out.

*   **Multiplayer**
    *   Easily host single-player worlds for friends with the **Essential Mod**.
    *   Includes built-in proximity voice chat (for server hosts you will need to open up a port in your firewall).
    *   Optimized for servers with higher player counts.
    *   Disables chat reporting for privacy.

Thank you for visiting my modpack!

_If the game is too dark, disable the "Hardcore Darkness" mod._

_Though the default/preset settings are fairly good, I would recommend tinkering!_

**To Reset Settings:**
Delete `options.txt` and all files inside the `config` folder (except the `yosbr` folder and `simple-modpack-update-checker.json`).
